seoTitle: Hackham vs Hackham West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hackham and Hackham West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hackham vs Hackham West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hackham and Hackham West.
heading: Hackham vs Hackham West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hackham, South Australia and Hackham West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hackham has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hackham West (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hackham or Hackham West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hackham has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Hackham West scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hackham scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Hackham West scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hackham or Hackham West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hackham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
